failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 40°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Particulate contamination or crystallization in the valve
failure_modes.mitigation: Install inline filter before BPR and ensure regular cleaning

failure_modes.cause: Unexpected reaction acceleration leading to rapid gas evolution
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement temperature monitoring and automated shutdown

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Introduce controlled particulate load to assess BPR blockage risk
Conduct reaction at 120°C with real-time pressure and temperature monitoring to validate system response to exotherm
